testcase.name: env 6.16 > DEMO_MODE default true
env 6.16 > SESSION_SECRET fail-fast di production tanpa secret
env 6.16 > SESSION_SECRET production menerima secret cukup panjang
env 6.16 > SESSION_SECRET dev jatuh ke fallback aman
env 6.16 > hasLlmKey mengikuti LLM_API_KEY
api envelope 6.3 > ok berbentuk {ok:true,data}
api envelope 6.3 > fail memetakan enam kode ke status
api envelope 6.3 > runRoute menerjemahkan ApiError ke envelope
api envelope 6.3 > runRoute menerjemahkan error tak terduga ke INTERNAL
auth session 6.4 > seal lalu unseal roundtrip
auth session 6.4 > getSession null tanpa cookie
auth session 6.4 > requireRole 401 tanpa sesi
auth session 6.4 > requireRole 403 saat role salah
rateLimit AC-SEC-07 > permintaan ke-6 dalam window diblokir
rateLimit AC-SEC-07 > window terpisah per IP
rateLimit AC-SEC-07 > clientIp mengambil IP pertama x-forwarded-for
fixture injeksi (AC-SEC-03) > payload XSS pada nama dan SQLi pada alamat tersimpan sebagai data inert
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/summary: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/summary: role anggota -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/summary: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/summary: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/verdict: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/verdict: role anggota -> bukan 401/403

role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/verdict: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN

role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/findings: role anggota -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/findings: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/findings: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN

role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > findings/[id]/rat: role anggota -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > findings/[id]/rat: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > findings/[id]/rat: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN

role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/flow: role anggota -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/flow: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/flow: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/voice: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/voice: role anggota -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/voice: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > member/voice: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > vote: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > vote: role anggota -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > vote: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > vote: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/transaksi: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/transaksi: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/transaksi: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/transaksi: role pengurus -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/pinjaman: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/pinjaman: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/pinjaman: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/pinjaman: role pengurus -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/rat: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/rat: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/rat: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/rat: role pengurus -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/recent: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/recent: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/recent: role pemerintah -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > subjek/recent: role pengurus -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/overview: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/overview: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/overview: role pemerintah -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/overview: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/koperasi/[id]: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/koperasi/[id]: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/koperasi/[id]: role pemerintah -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/koperasi/[id]: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/audit/run: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/audit/run: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/audit/run: role pemerintah -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > gov/audit/run: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > audit/[id]/status: tanpa sesi -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > audit/[id]/status: role anggota -> 403 FORBIDDEN
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > audit/[id]/status: role pemerintah -> bukan 401/403
role guard matrix (AC-SEC-01/02, AC-SUBJ-03) > audit/[id]/status: role pengurus -> 403 FORBIDDEN
perilaku endpoint > login benar -> 200 {role, redirectTo} + set-cookie
perilaku endpoint > login salah -> 401 tanpa membocorkan detail
perilaku endpoint > rate limit: percobaan ke-6 -> 429 (AC-SEC-07)
perilaku endpoint > onboarding NIK 15 digit -> VALIDATION onboard.nik.err
perilaku endpoint > onboarding NIK 16 digit -> kartu + sesi anggota
perilaku endpoint > vote idempoten: setuju -> 10/3, ulang tetap 10/3 (B2)
perilaku endpoint > rat idempoten: agregat 12 -> 13, ulang tetap 13 (B1)
perilaku endpoint > flow Juni: kategori kanonik + total dari DB nyata
perilaku endpoint > subjek transaksi mengubah saldoKas sesuai arah
perilaku endpoint > subjek transaksi pembelian tanpa vendor -> VALIDATION
perilaku endpoint > member/verdict: merah + jumlahTemuan seed
perilaku endpoint > member/findings: enam temuan, an1 pertama, belum ditambahkan
perilaku endpoint > member/voice: agregat terurut + keputusan belum memilih
perilaku endpoint > member/summary: uang anggota juri
perilaku endpoint > koperasiForAnggota: ang-juri -> kop-sukamaju, tak dikenal -> null
perilaku endpoint > gov/overview: KPI seed (12 koperasi, 17 temuan)
perilaku endpoint > gov/koperasi/[id]: tren 6 periode + temuan
perilaku endpoint > live audit tanpa key -> marker gagal_langsung + status baca cache
perilaku endpoint > persistLiveRun -> status selesai membaca run live
perilaku endpoint > audit/status id tak dikenal -> berjalan
perilaku endpoint > logout -> loggedOut true + hapus cookie
perilaku endpoint > subjek pinjaman + rat + recent
